Legal

  • Privacy Policy
  • Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
  • Privacy Center

Bundle phone and internet on America’s largest 5G network for a great low price.

Get 3 lines of Experience More wireless service—our most popular plan—and T-Mobile Home Internet for just $175/month with AutoPay.

Check availability , opens in a new window Compare providers
For new accounts. Internet delivered via 5G cellular network; speeds vary due to factors affecting cellular networks, including data prioritization. With Experience More, activate up to 4K UHD streaming on capable device, or video typically streams in SD. Up to 50GB high-speed tethering then unlimited on our network at max 3G speeds.

Make the switch in three easy steps.

Step 1

Check T-Mobile Home Internet availability in your area.

Step 2

Pick your T-Mobile Home Internet and voice plans.

Already have a T‑Mobile phone plan? Check out the FAQs below.

Step 3

Get connected to home internet in 15 minutes with just one cord.

Find out how much you can save compared to Verizon and AT&T.

Cost comparison of buying similar voice and 5G internet plans and equivalent streaming services with AT&T and Verizon, review T-Mobile.com for full pricing and plan details as included benefits vary. Taxes vary by location and are likely higher than estimated minimum provided. Included streaming services vary by T-Mobile plan (e.g. Netflix). AutoPay discount requires bank account or debit card, otherwise $10 more/line/month. $35/line device connection charge applies. Third Line and bundled internet discounted for new customers via monthly bill credits; credits end if you cancel any lines or change plans. Limited-time offers; subject to change. May not be combinable with some offers or discounts.

 
  T-Mobile
(Essentials Choice 55)		 Verizon
(Unlimited Welcome)		 AT&T
(55+)
Wireless
(2 lines)
$30/mo. per line $55/mo. per line $35/mo. per line

w/AutoPay discount

 $145/mo.
Save about 38% per mo. with T‑Mobile		 $99/mo.
Save about 9% per mo. with T‑Mobile

Limited-time; subject to change. Cost comparison of buying similar voice and 5G internet plans with AT&T and Verizon, review T-Mobile.com for full pricing and plan details as included benefits vary. Plus taxes and fees. Home Internet rate: With $20 in monthly bill credits. Qualifying credit, postpaid 55+ voice line (Min. age 55), and new Internet line required. If you have cancelled Internet lines in past 90 days, you may need to reactivate them first. Credits may take up to 2 bill cycles; credits will stop if you cancel any lines or change plans. Limit 1/account. AutoPay discount requires bank account or debit card, otherwise $10 more/line/month. $35/line device connection charge applies. May not be combinable with some offers or discounts; see FAQs at T-Mobile.com/plans.

How is home internet different than traditional cable internet?

Cable internet relies on wired connections, but T-Mobile Home Internet uses 5G to give you connectivity where wires can’t reach. Plus, we won’t tangle you up in long-term contracts.

Essentials Choice 55: Postpaid only. Max 2 voice lines. $35 device connection charge due at sale. Credit approval & deposit may be required. Monthly Regulatory Programs & Telco Recovery Fees totaling up to $4.49 per line, and federal and local surcharges apply. See Broadband Facts at T-Mobile.com. Capable device required for some features. Not combinable with certain offers. Switching plans may cause you to lose current plan/feature benefits; ask a rep for details. Plan not available for hotspots and some other data-first devices. Unlimited talk & text features for direct communications between 2 people; others (e.g., conference & chat lines, etc.) may cost extra. Some messages, including those over 1MB, use data and may be unavailable internationally. Roaming: U.S. roaming and on-network data allotments differ: includes 200MB roaming. High-speed data is US only; in Canada/Mexico, unlimited at up to 128kbps; additional purchase required for data elsewhere. Calls from 215+ countries and destinations, including over Wi-Fi, are $.25/min. (no charge for Wi-Fi calls to US, Mexico and Canada). Service may be terminated or restricted for excessive roaming. Not for extended international use; you must reside in the U.S. and primary usage must occur on our U.S. network. Device must register on our U.S. network before international use. Video streams at up to 2.5Mbps(SD). Optimization may affect speed of video downloads; does not apply to video uploads. For best performance, leave any video streaming applications at their default automatic resolution setting. Tethering at max 3G speeds. For customers using >50GB/mo., primary data usage must be on smartphone or tablet. Smartphone/tablet usage is prioritized over Mobile Hotspot (tethering) usage, which may result in higher speeds for data used on smartphones and tablets.

Rely Home Internet: During congestion, customers on this plan may notice speeds lower than other customers and further reduction if using >1.2TB/mo., due to data prioritization. Not available in all areas. $35 device connection charge due at sale. Plus taxes & fees for accounts currently paying for a T-Mobile wireless line with additional taxes & fees: Monthly Regulatory Programs & Telco Recovery Fees totaling up to $1.60 per line, and federal and local surcharges apply. See Broadband Facts at T-Mobile.com. Credit approval required. For use only with select T-Mobile Gateways for in-home use at location provided at activation; service restricted away from approved address. Return gateway undamaged or pay up to $370. Video streaming resolution depends on available speeds. For best performance, leave video streaming applications at their default resolution setting. Not compatible with some live TV streaming services. AutoPay Pricing for lines 1-8 on account. AutoPay discount requires bank account or debit card, otherwise $10 more/line/mo. May not be reflected on first bill. Network Management: Service may be slowed, suspended, terminated, or restricted for misuse, abnormal use, interference with our network or ability to provide quality service to other users. See T-Mobile.com/OpenInternet for details. See Terms and Conditions (including arbitration provision) at www.T-Mobile.com for additional information.

5G HOME INTERNET

Get a Month On Us, plus up to $200 back.

Switch and save on the fastest 5G home internet.

Shop plans

Use code MONTHONUS at checkout. Plus tax and $35 device connection charge. Month via bill credit. Money back via virtual prepaid card; allow 14 weeks from rebate submission.​ 

TRY T-MOBILE

Try our network FREE for 30 days.

All while keeping your phone and your carrier. 

Find out more
Qualifying non-T-Mobile network user & compatible, unlocked device required. 1 trial per user.

INTERNET TEST DRIVE 

​​Try our home internet for 15 days.

Test drive T-Mobile Home Internet for 15 days to see how great it works for you—or get your money back.

Find out more

Unlock more benefits when you bundle.

Stream your favorites with Netflix ON US.

Netflix Standard with ads is included with most Go5G plans. Another reason to bundle your phone and internet.

Check it out

Exclusive benefits from brands you love.

Save on entertainment, travel, streaming, and more with Magenta Status, available on select wireless plans.

Find out more

Got questions about bundling your phone and home internet?

  • Yes! T-Mobile offers a bundle plan that allows you to combine your cell phone service and Home Internet. By bundling these services, you can enjoy the convenience of having everything on one bill and may qualify for exclusive savings every month. We are always adding new ways to save here.

  • T-Mobile's phone and Internet bundles can vary depending on the Home Internet plan you choose. To find out what options are available in your area, simply use the eligibility tool.

  • To determine the best package for your needs, consider how much data you typically use, the speed of Internet you require, and how many devices you plan to connect. Our online tool can help you compare different packages based on your preferences. You can also click the chat icon on this screen or visit a local retail store to talk to one of us. 

     

  • You bet! If you are already a wireless or Home Internet customer with T-Mobile, we have great deals for you to bundle and save every month on your Home Internet plan.

  • Yes! You can get a discount when you bundle Home Internet with a qualifying phone plan.

  • The device connection fee for T-Mobile Internet is typically $35. However, we often run promotions that may waive this fee, so be sure to check with us for any current offers.

  • If you're switching to T-Mobile, getting the cell phone plus Home Internet bundle is seamless! Simply sign up for both a T-Mobile phone plan and Home Internet service, and you'll automatically receive our best deals on Home Internet. Check out the latest deals here.

  • In many cases, you can combine your current discounts with our bundling offers for even more savings. Check with our customer service team to see how your existing discounts can stack with our bundling options.

  • The amount you save can vary based on the plans you choose, but customers who bundle both phone and Home Internet services get the best deals on their Home Internet service. Check out the latest deals here.

     

Fastest 5G Home Internet: Based on Ookla Speedtest Intelligence® data, 2H 2025. All rights reserved. Month On Us: with one-time bill credit equal to monthly rate plus fees after AutoPay and other applicable discounts. Limited-time; subject to change. Qualifying new Internet line required. Enter promotional code at checkout. Not transferrable. Allow 2 bill cycles for credit. Limit 2/account. May not be combined with some offers or discounts. Money Back: Limited-time; subject to change. Register code within 30 days of activating qualifying new Internet line ($100: Rely; $200: Amplified; $300: All-In). If you have cancelled Internet lines in past 90 days, you may need to reactivate them first. Up to $300 via virtual prepaid Mastercard; use online or in-store via accepted mobile payment apps; no cash access & expires in 6 months. The Virtual Prepaid Mastercard is issued by Sunrise Banks N.A., Member FDIC, pursuant to a license from Mastercard International Incorporated. Mastercard is a registered trademark, and the circles design is a trademark of Mastercard International Incorporated. This card may be used everywhere Debit Mastercard is accepted. Registration, activation, acceptance, or use of this card constitutes acceptance of the terms and conditions stated in the Prepaid Card Agreement. This promotion is not associated, sponsored, or endorsed by Mastercard or Sunrise Banks N.A. Lines must be active and in good standing when card is issued. Max 1/account. May not be combined with some offers, discounts, or promotions.

​​Limited-time; subject to change. May not be combined with some offers or discounts. Savings with ​$20 monthly bill credit. Qualifying credit, postpaid voice line, and new Internet line required. If you have cancelled Internet lines in past 90 days, you may need to reactivate them first. Credits may take up to 2 bill cycles; credits will stop if you cancel any lines or change plans. Limit 1/account. Month On Us with one-time bill credit equal to monthly rate plus fees after AutoPay and other applicable discounts. Qualifying new Internet line required. Enter promotional code at checkout. Not transferable. Allow 2 bill cycles for credit. Limit 2/account. Prepaid Card: Register code within 30 days of activating qualifying new Internet line ($100: Rely; $200: Amplified; $300: All-In). If you have cancelled Internet lines in past 90 days, you may need to reactivate them first. Up to $300 via virtual prepaid Mastercard; use online or in-store via accepted mobile payment apps; no cash access & expires in 6 months. The Virtual Prepaid Mastercard is issued by Sunrise Banks N.A., Member FDIC, pursuant to a license from Mastercard International Incorporated. Mastercard is a registered trademark, and the circles design is a trademark of Mastercard International Incorporated. This card may be used everywhere Debit Mastercard is accepted. Registration, activation, acceptance, or use of this card constitutes acceptance of the terms and conditions stated in the Prepaid Card Agreement. This promotion is not associated, sponsored, or endorsed by Mastercard or Sunrise Banks N.A. Lines must be active and in good standing when card is issued. Max 1/account. Home Internet Rely General Terms: During congestion, customers on this plan may notice speeds lower than other customers and further reduction if using >1.2TB/mo., due to data prioritization. Not available in all areas. $35 device connection charge due at sale. Monthly Regulatory Programs & Telco Recovery Fees totaling up to $2.10 per line, and federal and local surcharges apply. See Broadband Facts at T-Mobile.com. Credit approval required. For use only with select T-Mobile Gateways for in-home use at location provided at activation; service restricted away from approved address. Return each device undamaged or pay up to $370. Video streaming resolution depends on available speeds. For best performance, leave video streaming applications at their default resolution setting. Not compatible with some live TV streaming services. AutoPay Pricing for lines 1-8 on account. AutoPay discount requires bank account or debit card, otherwise $10 more/line/mo. May not be reflected on first bill. Network Management: Service may be slowed, suspended, terminated, or restricted for misuse, abnormal use, interference with our network or ability to provide quality service to other users. See T-Mobile.com/OpenInternet for details. See Terms and Conditions (including arbitration provision) at www.T-Mobile.com for additional information.​ 

Fastest 5G Home Internet: Based on Ookla Speedtest Intelligence® data, 2H 2025. All rights reserved. Month On Us: with one-time bill credit equal to monthly rate plus fees after AutoPay and other applicable discounts. Limited-time; subject to change. Qualifying new Internet line required. Enter promotional code at checkout. Not transferrable. Allow 2 bill cycles for credit. Limit 2/account. May not be combined with some offers or discounts. Money Back: Limited-time; subject to change. Register code within 30 days of activating qualifying new Internet line ($100: Rely; $100: Amplified; $200: All-In). If you have cancelled Internet lines in past 90 days, you may need to reactivate them first. Up to $200 via virtual prepaid Mastercard; use online or in-store via accepted mobile payment apps; no cash access & expires in 6 months. The Virtual Prepaid Mastercard is issued by Sunrise Banks N.A., Member FDIC, pursuant to a license from Mastercard International Incorporated. Mastercard is a registered trademark, and the circles design is a trademark of Mastercard International Incorporated. This card may be used everywhere Debit Mastercard is accepted. Registration, activation, acceptance, or use of this card constitutes acceptance of the terms and conditions stated in the Prepaid Card Agreement. This promotion is not associated, sponsored, or endorsed by Mastercard or Sunrise Banks N.A. Lines must be active and in good standing when card is issued. Max 1/account. May not be combined with some offers, discounts, or promotions.

Hello! Want to stay logged in?

To keep your accounts safe, you'll be automatically logged out in: 

Share your screen while on a call or in store

Get guided support from an Expert in real time

  • For your security, personal info, tabs, and notifications are automatically hidden.
  • You can stop screen sharing at any time.
  • Experts can only see what’s on T-Mobile.com.
  • Don’t use screen share while driving or in any situation where it's unsafe to focus on your screen.

By clicking 'Accept and continue,' you are consenting to allow the Expert to view your screen for assisted navigation. This session may be recorded. To learn more, please visit the  T-Mobile Privacy Notice.

Next: Generate a code to share with your Expert

Share this code with your Expert

code

Once your code has been successfully entered by your Expert, this window will close and continue to the session.

Allow screen sharing with your Expert?

Personal and sensitive data is hidden for your security and privacy.

End your session?

Ending your session will stop sharing your screen, but will not end your call.

Your session has ended

Your screen is no longer being shared with your Expert.

You are already in an active session

Your code has expired

Generate a new one to share with your Expert.
